title: Discovery, Scope Lock & Delivery Blueprint
decision: BRD/FRD, role matrix and phase-level acceptance rules locked.
update_note: Discovery is complete. Delivery assumptions, module boundaries and approval checkpoints are baselined.

tasks.name: SRS walkthrough and scope boundary confirmation
BRD/FRD confirmation with module-wise acceptance rules
User roles, permissions and tenant access model
High-level architecture and data model draft
Delivery governance, demo cadence and sign-off workflow

title: Platform Foundation, Access Control & DevOps Base
decision: RBAC and tenant isolation need final role validation before foundation sign-off.
update_note: Authentication and base APIs are stable. RBAC, tenant isolation and CI/CD hardening are in progress.

tasks.name: Authentication, secure session and password flow
RBAC policy mapping for Admin, Supervisor, Agent and QA
Tenant/account isolation and workspace boundaries
Base API structure, error model and logging conventions
CI/CD pipeline, environment separation and secure repo rules

phase_risks.description: Delay in final user role approval can shift foundation sign-off

title: CRM, Case Management & Agent Workspace
decision: Case fields, customer profile fields and interaction categories must be confirmed before build start.
update_note: Ready for execution after foundation sign-off. Client sample data is required for realistic screens and flows.

tasks.name: Customer profile, account and contact information layout
Ticket/case creation, assignment and lifecycle states
Agent desktop with daily work queue and case context
Notes, activity timeline and interaction tracking
Search, filters and supervisor review visibility

phase_risks.description: Missing sample data can make CRM screens generic

title: Queue, Basic ACD Rules & Live Operations View
decision: Queue priority, agent availability rules and escalation conditions must be approved.
update_note: ACD will be implemented as a controlled work distribution layer with real-time supervisor visibility.

tasks.name: Queue configuration by team, skill and priority
Agent availability, status and capacity control
Basic routing logic for case/work distribution
WebSocket live events for queue and agent state
Supervisor live operations console

phase_risks.description: Complex telecom-grade ACD is outside current fixed platform scope

title: Workforce Management & QA Review System
client_action: Share shift policies and QA scorecard format
decision: Shift rules, attendance logic and QA parameters must be agreed before implementation.
update_note: This phase creates supervisor control for workforce planning and quality review evidence.

tasks.name: Shift creation, roster view and assignment workflow
Attendance, availability and exception records
QA scorecard builder and scoring workflow
Review notes, evidence references and audit trail
Supervisor team schedule and QA summary views

phase_risks.description: Unclear QA scorecard criteria can delay review workflows

title: Reports, Insights & Supervisor Command Center
decision: Management KPIs and report export expectations must be finalized before dashboard build.
update_note: Reporting phase turns operational records into clean dashboards and decision-ready summaries.

tasks.name: Case volume, status and ageing reports
Agent productivity and status reports
WFM schedule and attendance dashboards
QA performance and review summary reports
Supervisor command center with operational KPIs

phase_risks.description: Changing KPIs late can increase dashboard rework

title: Security Hardening, UAT, Deployment & Handover
decision: Production deployment depends on cloud/domain/provider decisions from client or partner.
update_note: Final phase validates stability, fixes critical issues, completes documentation and supports handover.

tasks.name: Security hardening, audit logs and access review
End-to-end UAT support and defect triage
Deployment assistance and environment verification
Admin, supervisor and user handover documentation
Knowledge transfer and final acceptance pack

phase_risks.description: Delayed UAT feedback can shift final handover date
